name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_AddItem_BodySite_SubSite
title: R5: Sub-location (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite` requires an extension for additional cardinality.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.bodySite.subSite` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A region or surface of the bodySite, e.g. limb region or tooth surface(s).
